task_history.content:
---
## VERSION 0
```json
{
  "job_analysis_steps": [
    "Read the job description carefully.",
    "Identify the core responsibilities of the job.",
    "Extract required skills (technical and soft skills).",
    "Determine the necessary qualifications (education, certifications, experience).",
    "Note the industry and company context.",
    "Identify key technologies or tools mentioned.",
    "Determine the level of experience required (entry-level, mid-level, senior-level).",
    "Analyze the required skills and experience in terms of importance (must-have vs. nice-to-have).",
    "Summarize the job requirements in a structured format (e.g., JSON, list).",
    "Identify any specific domain knowledge required.",
    "Note any specific personality traits or soft skills required.",
    "Extract information about salary and benefits if available.",
    "Document the type of employment (Full time, Part time, Contract).",
    "Identify the location of the job."
  ]
}
```

---
## FEEDBACK to VERSION 1
here are some feedbacks:
- The current JSON is entirely empty, so no actual requirements have been extracted.
- There’s no field capturing the raw job description text, which is needed as the source for extraction.
- We cannot populate any of the other fields until the job description is provided.

here are the changes:
```json

  "job_description": "",      
  "job_title": "",
  "company": "",
```
